statement: Across the exact 11 datasets, macro accuracy is PTBCC 0.7472, FGBCC 0.7175, BWA 0.7132, and MV 0.6986.
domain: The 11 Table 3 datasets with their released ground-truth subsets.
metric: unweighted mean of per-dataset fractional-tie accuracies
verified_if: Every independently regenerated macro rounds to its four-decimal paper value.
falsified_if: The exact released method/data combination contradicts a reported value.
